data.title: AEM Wins Initial Dismissal in U.S. Patent Dispute With Advantest
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

AEM Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:AWX) ) has issued an announcement.

AEM Holdings Ltd. has announced that a U.S. court has dismissed a patent infringement complaint filed by Advantest Test Solutions, Inc. against the company and its subsidiaries, ruling that the original filing did not adequately allege direct or indirect infringement and that mere reference to AEM’s patent applications was insufficient to support the claims. While Advantest has been granted leave to amend its complaint, AEM stated it will continue to evaluate any further filings, remains ready to defend its own patents and intellectual property, and does not expect the current ruling to have a material impact on its operations or financial position, though it cautioned shareholders and investors to remain prudent and promised further updates as necessary.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:AWX) stock is a Buy
with a S$11.80 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AEM Holdings Ltd. stock,
see the SG:AWX Stock Forecast page.

More about AEM Holdings Ltd.

AEM Holdings Ltd. is a Singapore-listed company operating in the semiconductor and electronics test industry, providing testing solutions and related equipment to global chip and electronics manufacturers. Its business is closely tied to intellectual property and patent protection in advanced test technologies, making legal clarity around patents important for its operations and competitive positioning.

Average Trading Volume: 7,079,136

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$3.39B

Find detailed analytics on AWX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest update is out from Larvotto Resources Limited ( (AU:LRV) ).

Larvotto Resources Limited has announced the cessation of 40,490 performance rights, which lapsed after the conditions attached to those rights were not met or became incapable of being satisfied as of June 30, 2026. data.title: Lifecare Advances Bergen Manufacturing and Vet CGM Longevity Study
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Lifecare AS ( (DE:LFC0) ) has provided an update.

Lifecare ASA is advancing its medical sensor business by centralising manufacturing operations in Bergen, Norway, as part of an operational restructuring to support scalable production. The company develops osmotic pressure-based continuous glucose monitoring systems for human and veterinary use, targeting improved long-term diabetes management through implantable sensor technology.

The company is completing a final production campaign in Cambridge to transfer manufacturing processes and know-how to Bergen, while producing implants for regulatory documentation and ongoing clinical preparations. Lifecare is also manufacturing implants for its veterinary longevity programme in dogs, which informs regulatory pathways and strengthens its positioning in the veterinary diabetes market.

In the current six-month canine implantation cohort, the second implant was explanted after continuous use, showing maintained electronic functionality, intact sensor structure, and no clinically significant adverse events. These findings support the implant’s durability, biocompatibility and safety profile, with comprehensive laboratory and histological evaluations underway to further validate long-term performance.

Data from the longevity study, combined with reference monitoring devices and in-clinic blood glucose assessments, have enabled more individualized diabetes treatment for the participating dogs. Veterinarian and owner feedback indicates that continuous glucose information improved diabetes management, reinforcing Lifecare’s confidence in the clinical value of continuous monitoring for veterinary diabetes care.

The ongoing programme is generating critical insight into long-term implant performance, system robustness and overall functionality, guiding product optimisation, manufacturing development and regulatory preparations. Lifecare is refining the communication architecture of its CGM system to enhance robustness without altering the core sensing technology, supporting continuous product improvement.

With repeated successful six-month implantations from reproducibly manufactured implants and the progressing transfer to Bergen, Lifecare is strengthening its transition toward scalable production and eventual commercialisation. These developments enhance the company’s attractiveness to potential commercial partners in the veterinary market and support its broader strategic positioning in continuous glucose monitoring.

More about Lifecare AS

Lifecare ASA is a medical sensor company developing technology for sensing and monitoring various body analytes in humans and pets. The company focuses on bringing next-generation continuous glucose monitoring systems to market, using osmotic pressure as a sensing principle to support advanced diabetes management applications.

Average Trading Volume: 4,442,397

Current Market Cap: NOK117.8M

data.title: Arafura Rare Earths Wins Strong Shareholder Backing for Major Capital-Raising Resolutions
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Arafura Resources ( (AU:ARU) ) has provided an update.

Arafura Rare Earths Limited reported that all resolutions put to shareholders at its 2 July 2026 general meeting were approved by poll, including key capital-raising measures. The resolutions covered share issues to Export Finance Australia and KfW, the issuance of convertible notes to the National Reconstruction Fund Corporation, ratification and continuation of a multi-tranche placement, and shares under a share purchase plan including director participation.

The strong approval rates across all items, many above 90% support, underscore solid shareholder backing for Arafura’s funding strategy and capital structure. These measures bolster the company’s balance sheet and financing capacity, enhancing its ability to advance rare earth development activities and reinforcing its position in securing long-term funding partnerships with government-backed and institutional investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ARU) stock is a Buy

More about Arafura Resources

Arafura Rare Earths Limited is an ASX-listed company focused on the exploration and development of rare earth mineral resources. Its projects aim to support supply chains for critical rare earth elements used in high-tech and clean energy applications, positioning the company within the strategic minerals and advanced manufacturing sectors.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from MLG Oz Ltd ( (AU:MLG) ).

MLG Oz Ltd has disclosed a change in the interests of managing director Murray Leahy, reflecting an internal restructuring of his equity position rather than an external market transaction. The update, lodged with the ASX, details movements between direct and indirect holdings but does not involve cash consideration.

Leahy has converted 1,353,877 vested 2023 performance rights into an equivalent number of fully paid ordinary shares held through White Sand Enterprises Pty Ltd, where he is sole shareholder and director. Following the exercise, his indirect shareholding has increased, while his remaining performance rights now relate only to the 2024 and 2025 awards, reinforcing his long-term equity alignment with the company’s performance.

OM Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:OMH) ) has issued an announcement.

OM Holdings director Low Ngee Tong has increased his indirect shareholding in the company, acquiring 100,000 OMH ordinary shares on market at A$0.225 per share. Following the transaction, Low now holds 59,141,231 shares via HSBC Custody Nominees (Australia) Limited and 10,200,000 shares in his own name, reinforcing his sizeable ownership position and signalling continued confidence in the company’s prospects.

The purchase was executed as an on-market trade and does not involve any related contracts or derivatives, indicating a straightforward equity accumulation. While small relative to his existing stake, the incremental investment further concentrates ownership in the hands of management, a development that may be closely watched by investors tracking insider activity as a gauge of sentiment toward OM Holdings’ future performance.

More about OM Holdings Ltd.

OM Holdings Limited is an Australia-listed company, trading under the ticker OMH, with its ordinary shares held both directly and via custody arrangements. The company has a significant shareholder-director structure, with director Low Ngee Tong holding a substantial equity stake, reflecting closely aligned management and shareholder interests.

data.title: Travel Expert declares final dividend for year ended March 2026
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Travel Expert (Asia) Enterprises Limited ( (HK:1235) ) has provided an announcement.

Travel Expert (Asia) Enterprises Limited has declared a final ordinary cash dividend of HKD 0.01 per share for the financial year ended 31 March 2026. The dividend, subject to shareholder approval on 18 August 2026, will be paid in Hong Kong dollars on 25 September 2026 to shareholders registered by the record date of 11 September 2026.

The shares will trade ex-dividend from 07 September 2026, with a book closure period from 09 to 11 September 2026 to determine eligible holders. The announcement underlines the company’s intention to return cash to shareholders, signaling confidence in its financial position despite a competitive travel market environment.

More about Travel Expert (Asia) Enterprises Limited

Travel Expert (Asia) Enterprises Limited is a Hong Kong-listed travel services company that operates in the tourism and leisure industry. The group focuses on providing travel-related products and services to customers in Asia, leveraging its local market presence and experience in outbound and regional travel arrangements.

data.title: Swift TV Director Boosts Shareholding via Performance Rights Conversion
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Swift Networks Group Limited ( (AU:STV) ) has provided an update.

Swift TV Ltd has disclosed a change in director Brian Mangano’s interests following the conversion of vested performance rights into fully paid ordinary shares. Prior to the change, Mangano held a substantial mix of direct and indirect shareholdings, options, and FY23–FY25 performance rights, reflecting a heavily equity-linked remuneration structure.

On 2 July 2026, 8,445,946 FY23 performance rights vested and were converted at nil cash consideration into the same number of fully paid ordinary shares, increasing Mangano’s indirect shareholding to 12,664,127 shares while reducing his performance rights balance. The transaction, recorded as a conversion of vested rights rather than a market trade, further aligns the director’s incentives with long-term shareholder interests and clarifies the company’s evolving capital and governance profile.

More about Swift Networks Group Limited

Swift TV Ltd, part of Swift Networks Group Limited, operates in the digital media and telecommunications space, providing television and content delivery services. Its offerings typically focus on managed entertainment and connectivity solutions, positioning the company within niche markets such as enterprise, hospitality, and institutional customers.

The company’s securities structure includes fully paid ordinary shares, listed options, and multiple tranches of performance rights tied to financial year targets and vesting timelines. This mix of equity instruments reflects a remuneration and incentive framework aligned with multi-year performance milestones for key executives.

Swift TV’s market presence is supported by significant shareholdings and performance-based equity held by directors, underscoring the alignment of management interests with shareholder value. The firm’s approach to incentivisation and equity conversion is indicative of broader industry practices in ASX-listed technology and media companies.

Average Trading Volume: 7,246,534

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$8.13M
